summary: OpenNori report/status now separate reused standard library choices from minimal self-build product semantics: parseArgs is reused for CLI tokenization, schema validation has Ajv/Zod/Valibot candidates recorded for growth, Markdown parsing is explicitly limited to generated-table recovery, and product-domain audits remain local with self-build reasons.
reviewability: Review status/report architecture.build_vs_buy plus package.json and the decision directory.
limitations: The implementation still has a growing src/cli.js; the recorded CLI framework decision says to re-evaluate commander/citty/cac if subcommand routing keeps expanding. This was produced before joint user-agent build-vs-buy evaluation and must not be treated as completion evidence.
